assertions.evidence: Code uses locale.toUpperCase() as Language and translation match by enum locale in CustomViewPage.
Visible text on /en/ut-cv-full-353a918a shows EN content (e.g., 'UT Full EN Title').
Visible text on /vi/ut-cv-full-353a918a shows VI content (e.g., 'UT Full VI Tiêu đề') and EN title is absent from visible text.
/en/ut-cv-missing-en-353a918a renders successfully and shows VI fallback text 'Only VI translation exists for fallback check.'.
EN/VI full-page routes render all 5 block-type texts, and locale switching changes all visible text while keeping navbar/footer layout.

summary: Rerun i18n/integration validation passed all 5 assertions.
